title: Hermes Agent + Ollama = 100% Private OS
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates how to build a 100% private operating system by combining Hermes Agent with Ollama and other open-source software. The setup keeps user data local and private while providing AI capabilities without relying on cloud services, though with slower performance compared to cloud-based alternatives.
